product_graph:
name: Mock Storage Bin — 1 unit
goal: >
  Demonstrate the simplest foreground product linked to one process in the
  bundled tiny mock background database. All inventory values are fictional.

functional_unit:
  description: 1 mock storage bin
  amount: 1.0
  unit: unit

products:
  - { name: Mock storage bin, unit: unit }

processes:
  - name: Mock storage bin molding
    reference_output: { flow: Mock storage bin, amount: 1.0, unit: unit }
    inputs:
      - { flow: "Mock polypropylene granulate, at plant", location: MOCK, database: mock_background, amount: 0.8, unit: kilogram }

reference_process: Mock storage bin molding

lcia:
  method_name: "EF v3.1"
svg_structure:
